message:
feat(content-index): expose IndexWriter publicly for worker integration

Re-export tantivy::IndexWriter from content-index public API to enable
index-worker to use the type without directly depending on tantivy internals.

Changes:
- Add pub use tantivy::IndexWriter
- Move IndexWriter from private import to public re-export
- Maintains proper abstraction layers between crates

Related: c00.5.1 (worker job contract)
